title: Author Ai Settings
description: Public AI prompt settings. Do not store API keys, tokens, passwords, or private credentials here.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Public prompt sent through the app-owned AI provider configuration.
prompt.default: Suggest one cozy action for my desktop pet.

conversationId.title: Conversation ID
conversationId.description: Public conversation label used to keep plugin AI history separate.

announce.title: Announce response
announce.description: Ask the pet to announce that the AI response is ready.
